method: Sum of Biomass per transect, then mean across transects (pandas groupby.sum + mean)

method: Sum of Biomass per transect (grouped by Reef, Habitat, Transect), then mean across transects
params: scope=Cabo Pulmo 2023 reserve; fish records = rows with non-null Biomass (blank/NaN dropped as non-biomass records); transect identified by Reef+Habitat+Transect; community biomass = sum per transect; secondary=std across transects; no scaling/seed/split

method: Group records by unique transect (Reef+Habitat+Transect), sum Biomass within each transect to get community biomass, then average across transects (pandas groupby, sum, mean)
params: scope=Cabo Pulmo 2023 all records; transect key=Reef+Habitat+Transect; NaN Biomass records treated as no biomass (skipped in sum, min_count=1); no scaling/seed/split; 41 transects, all with >=1 biomass record

method: Group records by unique transect (Reef+Habitat+Transect), sum Biomass per transect (community biomass), then take the mean across transects.
params: scope=Cabo Pulmo 2023 all reefs/habitats; transect key=Reef+Habitat+Transect; NaN Biomass treated as no-biomass (0 contribution) via groupby sum with min_count=1; no scaling/seed/split; secondary=std across transects

method: Per-transect community biomass = sum of record Biomass grouped by transect, then arithmetic mean across transects (pandas groupby.sum + mean)
params: scope=Cabo Pulmo 2023; transect identity=(Reef,Habitat,Transect); biomass aggregation=sum per transect with NaN treated as no-contribution (min_count=1); secondary=std across transects; no scaling, no split, no seed

method: Sum biomass per transect, then mean across transects (community per-transect biomass)
params: Grouped by Reef+Habitat+Transect; NaN Biomass records contribute 0 to transect sums (blank = non-biomass records); scope = all Cabo Pulmo 2023 records; no scaling/seed/split; all 41 transects had biomass

method: Sum of Biomass per unique transect, then mean across transects

method: Per-transect biomass aggregation: sum Biomass within each unique transect, then mean across transects
params: Transect identity = Reef x Habitat x Transect; NaN Biomass records contribute 0 within each transect sum (pandas groupby sum default); scope = all Cabo Pulmo 2023 records; secondary = std of per-transect biomass; 41 transects; total biomass sum = 135.10

method: Sum Biomass per transect then mean across transects
